title: Koby’s Rescue Begins
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Prince Grus, Garp, Koby, SWORD as Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.
scene: Garp storms Hachinosu to rescue Koby, bringing SWORD, Blackbeard’s commanders, and pirate island chaos into direct conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone in sword has officially resigned their commission.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that allows them to ignore certain command protocols...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For example, they can fight an emperor like you without authorization...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the Navy can always disavow their actions and cut them loose at any point.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ohhh, I get it now! So that's why some rats scurry away...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While others don't hesitate to gnaw on your fingertips!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ZE ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Still, I ain't budging on this! Let's see how far this plan takes us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I doubt the government would write you off that easily!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, the public wouldn't be pleased to hear they lost their precious hero!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Things Don't Go My Way, I Can At least Give The Government A Bloody Lose!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: until then, keep him locked up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't have him slippin' away and ruinin' my fun!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, sir!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Stop Right There, Roby!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Weez! Weez!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! I'll let you out if you free Moria- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: He's in one of the deeper cells!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I may have teamed up with a pirate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But that doesn't change my duty!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come in!! Three Marines are attacking the port!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did they just say three Marines?! There's no way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They're crazy strong, watch out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: AYA!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gosh, what am I thinking?! It's not like they'd send anyone just to save me, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When did I start thinking the world revolved around me? I need to get a grip before I embarrass myself!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who the heck are these guys?! They're so tough!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They seem to be trying to push us back to the town center!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What are they up to?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Stop them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Dammit!! Our guns aren't working on them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gyaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Enough already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: GWAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Woah! I cut his head off!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That stings...

dialogue.speaker: Prince Grus
dialogue.text: The hell, is he made of Clay?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No way... he's a logical?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wobble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey... did that building just move?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gya Ha Ha, yeah right! You've had one drink too many!!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Where'd that Koby Guy go?!

summary: This part advances the Hachinosu Rescue through 44 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
